CustomField.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., FR, DE, UK, DK). The engine filters all zone records by matching this field against Trip__c.Country_Code__c. Each country can define its own set of distance-based zones.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: ISO country code (e.g., FR for France, DE for Germany). Zones are country-specific.
CustomField.label: Country Code
